title: Obvious Nether Wart
description: A simple texture pack that makes the stages of Nether Wart growth more obvious by making it slowly turn red. :-)
body:
This is a simple resource pack which slightly alters the colour of Nether Wart Stage 1 and 2 to make it more distinct from its third and final stage.

![Nether Wart stages 3 through 1. Stage 3 is red, stage 2 is orange, and stage 1 is yellow.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cdc10fc69e971fe3c91ec5d9575986b3b80626b.png)
